title: How to Actually Work With Us on Healthcare AI Research
author: John Wu
preview: A practical guide to joining the PyHealth Research Initiative: join Discord, pick a bounty, and earn trust by shipping a solid PR.

title: Faster, Cleaner Healthcare Data Preprocessing with PyHealth
author: John Wu
preview: pyhealth.tasks separates static data loading from dynamic transformation logic, so you can iterate on preprocessing pipelines quickly without re-loading gigabytes of data every time.

title: FHIR Data Loading Comes to PyHealth
author: John Wu
preview: PyHealth now loads FHIR data natively, starting with MIMIC-IV-on-FHIR and an EHRMamba pipeline. It is early, so we want your bug reports.

title: Generate Synthetic Patients with PyHealth
author: John Wu & Andy Gao
preview: PyHealth now ships a synthetic EHR generation module, five generators behind one API plus a privacy and utility evaluation suite, and we need your help testing it.
